name: Pepper Lentil Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup + 2 tablespoons red wine (burgundy or other)
2 cups chopped sweet red bell peppers
1/4 cup freshly chopped basil for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and sort the lentils. Bring 4 cups of water to a boil, add lentils and bay leaves. Simmer until the lentils are tender but have not lost their shape. Strain and remove the bay leaves.
2. In a separate pan, combine onions, garlic (at least 4 or 5), and dried basil. Braise them in red wine.
3. Seed, core, and chop the red peppers. Add to the onion mixture and let them stew with the onions until soft, about 25 to 30 minutes. Transfer these vegetables to a blender or food processor and puree until smooth.
4. Stir the lentils into the sauce (do not puree the lentils).
5. Add vinegar, salt, and pepper to taste.
6. Cook pasta according to package directions (no salt or oil). Drain and serve with sauce. Garnish with chopped basil.
Serving size - 1/2 cup sauce + 1 cup pasta
345 calories
0.9 grams total fat
0.1 grams saturated fat
0 milligrams cholesterol
